title: Senior PHP Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE As a rapidly growing company, Jotform is seeking a Senior PHP Developer in our İzmir office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Teknopark İzmir. Here’s what you will be doing: Work closely with product management, front end developers, devOps and designers Design, build and deploy new features for Jotform Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to production having 35 million users Review and iterate architecture to ensure scale along with the growth Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: BS Degree in Computer Science/Engineering or related technical field or equivalent practical experience 5+ year experience building web applications Proficiency in PHP Familiarity with Distributed Systems programming Experience in SaaS and high traffic applications are highly preferred Understanding of HTML, CSS, Javascript, React and other web technologies Solid understanding of OOP principles Working experience with CI/CD and related tools like Git and Jenkins Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Excellent command of English Personal Specifications/Skills: Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision A passion to learn and keep up with the latest technologies Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! Challenging projects, regular feedback, healthy competition Fun & Relax working environment: When we’re in the office; music, jeans and t-shirts are the norm & kitchens stocked with healthy & tasty snacks & drinks OUR PROCESS We’ll review your application along with all the others we receive and pick the top profiles for a screening call. In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. https://www.jotform.com/job-applicant-privacy/

title: Backend Developer
description: Fuzul Holding ve grup şirketlerimize yönelik; CRM, ERP, CMS, Web ve Mobil uygulamalar geliştiren kurumsal bir yazılım ekibiyiz. Ölçeklenebilir, sürdürülebilir ve uzun vadeli ürünler tasarlıyor; iş süreçlerini teknolojiyle güçlendiriyoruz. Bu rolde; kullanıcı deneyimini ön planda tutan, veri odaklı çalışan ve ürünleşebilir yazılımları kurgulayıp yayına alabilen bir yaklaşım bekliyoruz. Karmaşık iş kurallarını doğru modelleyen, sistem içerisinde sorumluluk alan, veri akışını öngörülebilir ve yönetilebilir hale getiren çözümler üretmenizi hedefliyoruz. Geliştirilen uygulamaların performanslı, güvenli ve genişletilebilir olması temel önceliğimizdir. Kod kalitesi, mimari düşünce ve uzun vadeli sürdürülebilirlik bizim için vazgeçilmezdir. PR süreçlerine aktif katkı sağlamanızı ve teknik karar mekanizmalarında sorumluluk almanızı bekliyoruz. Aradığımız Nitelikler Zorunlu Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Matematik Mühendisliği veya ilgili mühendislik / sayısal bölümlerden mezun olmak En az 5 yıl backend geliştirme deneyimi .NET 8/9 ve Web API hakimiyeti MsSql deneyimi Entity Framework Core ile code-first yaklaşım deneyimi Clean / Onion Architecture bilgisi CQRS, Dependency Injection ve Repository Pattern bilgisi Git deneyimi Tercihen NestJS deneyimi Prisma ORM deneyimi ASP.NET Core SignalR / Socket.IO veya benzeri gerçek zamanlı iletişim teknolojileri RabbitMQ veya benzeri message broker deneyimi PostgreSQL deneyimi Microservices mimarisi deneyimi Redis veya benzeri caching sistemleri OpenTelemetry, Serilog gibi observability araçlarına aşinalık FluentValidation ile validation pipeline deneyimi Node.js, AWS Lambda, SQS deneyimi xUnit ile unit test / mimari test yazma deneyimi PDF generation veya template engine deneyimi (iText7, Handlebars, Scriban)

title: PHP Developer
description: BGTS is a software and technology solutions company with over 1,800 professionals and 25+ years of experience. Through engineering expertise and industry insight , our international offices deliver tailored solutions, enabling clients worldwide to achieve their business goals with flexibility, speed, and impactful results . We are looking for a Senior PHP Consultant for our client who will play a key role in maintaining a legacy system, handling incoming support tickets, and ensuring the stability of existing applications. This role focuses on the ongoing support, troubleshooting, and maintenance of a PHP-based system (v5.4), contributing to the continuity and reliability of core business operations. What You’ll Be Doing Take ownership of incoming technical requests and drive issues to resolution end-to-end Work hands-on with a legacy PHP (v5.4) system , keeping it stable and reliable Investigate, troubleshoot, and fix bugs in a live production environment Play a key role in ensuring business continuity by maintaining critical systems What We’re Looking For 7+ years of PHP experience , with a strong senior mindset Proven experience working with legacy systems (you know how to navigate and improve them) Ability to work independently and proactively in a support-driven environment Good to Have Experience in support, maintenance, or ticket-based roles A pragmatic mindset - someone who enjoys solving real-world issues over building from scratch Ability to quickly understand and adapt to existing codebases and workflows

title: Backend Developer
description: Location: Onsite, Istanbul/Maslak Description: We are seeking a Backend Developer to provide technical leadership and mentor a team of developers in designing and developing high-performance, scalable backend systems. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in building distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and microservices while ensuring the highest code quality and system reliability. Responsibilities: Lead and mentor a backend development team, ensuring best practices and high coding standards. Design and implement scalable and high-performance backend architectures. Actively participate in coding and software development to build scalable and high-performance backend architectures. Develop event-driven and distributed systems using message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.). Optimize and manage relational (SQL) and non-relational (NoSQL) databases for high availability and performance. Utilize caching mechanisms (Redis, Memcached, etc.) to enhance system efficiency. Conduct code reviews and architectural discussions to maintain quality and scalability. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align technical decisions with business needs. Stay updated with new technologies and incorporate them into the project when necessary. Work efficiently in an Agile/Scrum environment, participating in sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives. Qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. At least 5 years of experience in backend development. Strong expertise in Java and Spring Boot. Hands-on experience with Aspect-Oriented Programming (AOP), preferably in Java with Spring AOP. Hands-on experience with microservices architecture. Proficiency in event-driven development and messaging systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.). Strong understanding of software security principles and experience in implementing secure coding practices. Experience working with SQL and NoSQL databases. Familiarity with caching mechanisms to optimize performance. Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, high-traffic system environment. Preferred Qualifications: Experience in high-traffic systems such as sports betting, e-commerce, or fintech. Knowledge of DevOps and CI/CD processes. Experience with cloud computing platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure). Familiarity with observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, NewRelic). What We Offer: Opportunities for technical and professional growth. A collaborative and dynamic work environment. Linkedin üzerinden elektronik olarak ileteceğiniz kişisel bilgileriniz, Şanstech bünyesinde oluşacak mevcut ve gelecek işe alım ihtiyaçları doğrultusunda istihdam olanaklarının değerlendirilmesi amacıyla 7 Nisan 2016 tarihli Resmi Gazete’de yayımlanan 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu kapsamında veri sorumlusu olarak tarafımızca işlenecek ve veri tabanımızda gizlilik içerisinde saklanacaktır. Detaylı bilgiye internet sitemizde (https://www.sans-technology.com/kvkk) Aydınlatma Metni içerisindeki “Çalışan Aday” alt başlığından ulaşabilirsiniz.

title: Full Stack Developer (Next.js & Laravel)
description: Full Stack Developer (Next.js & Laravel) egegen olarak ,  Markalara dijital dünyada fark yaratacak çözümler üretiyoruz. Yazılım, web, mobil ve dijital pazarlamayı yaratıcılıkla buluşturuyoruz. İzmir’den başlayıp Türkiye ve yurtdışında yüzlerce markaya ulaştık. Bizim için başarı; güven vermek, ekip ruhu ve tutkuyla üretmek demek. Geleceğin dijital çözümlerini bugünden tasarlıyoruz. Sorumluluklar: • Next.js ile kullanıcı arayüzlerini geliştirmek ve optimize etmek • Laravel ile API ve backend süreçlerini tasarlamak • Mevcut projeleri iyileştirmek, yeni özellikler eklemek • Frontend ve backend entegrasyonunu yönetmek • Kod kalitesi, performans ve güvenlik konularında sorumluluk almak Aranan Nitelikler: • En az 5 yıl Full Stack deneyim • Next.js ve Laravel konusunda güçlü olmak • RESTful API geliştirme ve entegrasyon deneyimi • HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+) bilgisi • MySQL, PostgreSQL gibi veritabanlarıyla çalışma deneyimi • Git ile proje takibi ve sürüm kontrolü • Kullanıcı dostu ve responsive arayüzler geliştirebilmek Ne Sunuyoruz? • Prestijli projelerde yer alma fırsatı • Hibrit çalışma imkânı. • Deneyiminizi gösterebileceğiniz modern teknoloji stack’i. • Profesyonel ve samimi bir ekiple birlikte çalışma imkânı. Başvurularınızı CV’niz ve portfolyonuzla birlikte info@egegen.com adresine gönderebilirsiniz.

title: Backend Engineer - Go Developer
description: Lifemote Networks At Lifemote, we build AI-driven Wi-Fi Analytics tools that help Internet Service Providers gain visibility into the quality of connectivity at customers’ homes and create proactive solutions. Lifemote helps transform how Internet Service Providers access home connectivity data, complement their first and second line of Customer Service operations, and create value by driving up customer satisfaction at home. Comprising a vibrant and youthful group of professionals, Lifemote boasts expertise in the realm of Wi-Fi Analytics. Our solution has been successfully deployed on over 6 million devices spanning 7 European countries. Our team is rapidly expanding in tandem with our ambitious aspirations for the future. We are looking for a Backend Engineer to join our team and help us build solid products. The design and development of scalable, reliable backend services and their maintenance require the fine craftsmanship of skillful backend engineers. They are pillar stones of our company; they give life to and nourish our highly anticipated and highly acclaimed product. As the old adage goes: “The Backend giveth and the Backend taketh away” About the Position Must-Have Strong engineering skills and programming fundamentals Have +2 years of software development experience Highly eager to learn and quick learner Experienced with Go and/or Kotlin Proficient in concurrency concepts and async programming Experienced in REST and gRPC API design and development Experienced in Relational DBMS like MySQL Experienced with Git version control system Experience with unit testing, integration testing, and load testing Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and CI/CD pipelines Strong collaboration skills, system thinking, and ability to clearly explain complex concepts Self-motivated and self-managing with strong organizational skills Strong English language communication skills Nice to Have (one or more) Experience with Quarkus framework Experience working with cloud services particularly AWS Understanding of infrastructure as code using Terraform Fundamental understanding of computer networks, as the role requires frequent interaction with network-related concepts and tasks Basic experience with frontend technologies like React and TypeScript Responsibilities Design and implement scalable, reliable, maintainable backend services Troubleshoot and debug applications Design and implement scalable, reliable, maintainable backend services. Stand up for improvements to software quality, security, and performance. Troubleshoot and debug applications. Champion testing, reusability, and readability within the development team. Encourage innovation and foster an environment of continuous improvement. Maintain in-depth knowledge of the organization's technologies and architectures. What You’ll Achieve? The realm of ISP technology is vast, dynamic, and ever-evolving. Each day, you'll dive into the exciting waves of Wi-Fi and in-home Wi-Fi analytics. And guess what? This adventure doesn't have an expiration date. Over two decades and beyond, there will always be something new to explore and master. But that's not all. As a key contributor to the industry, you'll shine brightly in the spotlight, building enduring relationships with leaders across various domains – from the technical realm to the business sphere and everything in between. Your influence will span industries and continents, making your mark on the future of connectivity. What's in it for you? We will provide you with a competitive salary, stock option plan, competitive private health insurance coverage, and a lunch card. You will have access to an online training platform and get funding for conferences & events. You will be able to work with clients from the Netherlands, Norway, Austria, the UK, and worldwide.Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Lifemote!

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Haberler.com, dijital yayıncılık alanında Türkiye'nin önde gelen haber portallarından biri olarak, günlük milyonlarca ziyaretçiye kaliteli hizmet sunmaktadır. Dinamik ve yenilikçi ekibimize , Full stack Developer olarak katılmak üzere yetenekli profesyoneller arıyoruz. Görev Tanımı: CTO'ya raporlama ve işbirliği içinde çalışma. Atanan projelerde görevleri takip etme ve tamamlama. Projelerde ortaya çıkan hataları tespit etme ve düzeltme. Backend ve Frontend mimarisi ve veritabanı gereksinimlerinin geliştirilmesi. Yüksek standartlarda, verimli ve ölçeklenebilir yazılım tasarımları oluşturma. Yazılım doğrulama ve kullanıcı fonksiyon testleri ile geliştirmelerin kalitesini sağlama. Aranan Nitelikler: Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Bilgisayar Programcılığı vb. bölümlerinden mezun. Asp.Net MVC, .Net Core ve C# konularında en az 3 yıl deneyim. HTML, CSS, Javascript, Typescript, SOAP ve REST API, Bootstrap konularında uzmanlık. Nesne yönelimli programlama (OOP), SOLID prensipleri konusunda bilgi sahibi. SQL veritabanlarına (tercihen MSSQL), ORM (EF, Dapper), ve RDMS konseptlerine hakim. Kod versiyonlama (SVN, GIT tercih sebebi) ve CI/CD süreçlerine aşina. XML, JSON, Excel, SOAP entegrasyonları konusunda deneyimli. Güçlü iletişim becerileri, sorumluluk alabilen, planlı ve analitik düşünebilen. Tercih Edilen Ekstra Beceriler: SQL sorguları perforfmans iyileştirmeleri CRM yazılımları konusunda tecrübe.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Apilex is building an AI-native legal platform used in real legal operations — where clarity, trust, and product quality are non-negotiable. As we scale rapidly, we're expanding our backend team to make our systems more scalable, stable, and high-performing, and to support AI-powered workflows at production quality. What are you going to do? Design and develop high-traffic, scalable microservice architectures Raise the bar on code quality and lead code review processes Provide technical mentorship within the team What are we looking for? Strong foundation in software architecture design, OOP, SOLID principles, and design patterns at various scales 5+ years of backend experience with Java and Spring Boot (or similar JVM-based frameworks) Production experience with both MongoDB or similar NoSQL databases and PostgreSQL or similar relational databases, with the ability to design hybrid data architectures Strong knowledge of Elasticsearch or similar search and indexing technologies Experience with RabbitMQ, Kafka, or similar messaging systems Hands-on experience with Redis or similar in-memory caching solutions Solid understanding of WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and CI/CD pipelines Strong grasp of microservice architecture design and inter-service communication

title: Full Stack Developer (Ankara/Istanbul)
description: Full Stack Developer We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to join the team at a company operating in the oil & gas trading sector. Work Type: Hybrid Location: İstanbul/Ankara Description We're looking for Full Stack Developer experienced in developing Restful API, designing database structures and developing responsive front-end. What You’ll Do * Design and develop backend services and RESTful APIs using Python * Build and maintain modern, responsive front-end applications * Design and evolve database schemas and data models * Work closely with product and engineering teams in a fast-moving startup environment * Take ownership of features from idea to production * Contribute to system design, scalability, and code quality Required Skills * Solid experience building backend applications with Python * Experience with FastAPI or Django / Django REST Framework * Strong knowledge of JavaScript, HTML, and CSS * Experience with modern front-end frameworks, preferably React, VueJS * Experience with TypeScript or willingness to work with it * Hands-on experience designing and developing RESTful APIs * Experience with relational databases, preferably PostgreSQL * Familiarity with Git and issue tracking tools (e.g. Jira) * Experience working in Docker-based environments Nice to Have * Experience with Redis (cache, queues, or background jobs) * Experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitLab CI preferred) * Basic knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) * Exposure to Kubernetes (basic knowledge is enough) * Experience with background jobs, async programming, or message brokers * Understanding of clean code, testing, and system design best practices * Previous startup experience or strong ownership mindset

title: Senior Frontend Developer (React.js+Next.js)
description: About us: Talent has no borders. Proxify's mission is to connect top developers around the world with opportunities they deserve. So, it doesn't matter where you are; we are here to help you fast-track your independent career in the right direction. 🙂 Since our launch, Proxify's developers have successfully worked with 1200+ happy clients to build their products and growth features. 5000+ talented developers trust Proxify and its network to fulfill their dreams and objectives. Proxify is shaped by a global network of supportive, talented developers interested in remote full-time jobs. Our Glassdoor (4.5/5) and Trustpilot (4.8/5) ratings reflect the trust developers place in us and our commitment to our members' success. The Role: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer with strong proficiency with React.js and Next.js for one of our clients. You are a perfect candidate if you are growth-oriented, you love what you do, and you enjoy working on new ideas to develop exciting products. What we’re looking for: Minimum of 5 years of experience in frontend development with a strong portfolio of projects demonstrating expertise in React.js and Next.js. Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, and modern frontend development tools and frameworks. Experience with state management libraries such as Redux, MobX, or similar. Proficiency with testing frameworks and tools like Jest, Cypress, or Testing Library. Strong knowledge of version control systems, particularly Git. Responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain high-performance, scalable web applications using React.js and Next.js. Create reusable and maintainable UI components with a focus on performance and accessibility. Work closely with designers, backend developers, and product managers to translate user needs and business goals into functional and engaging web applications. Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code following best practices in software development. Identify and address performance bottlenecks to ensure smooth and responsive user experiences. Conduct unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing to ensure the reliability and robustness of the applications. What we offer: Get paid, not played No more unreliable clients. Enjoy on-time monthly payments with flexible withdrawal options. Predictable project hours Enjoy a harmonious work-life balance with consistent 8-hour working days with clients. Flex days, so you can recharge Enjoy up to 24 flex days off per year without losing pay, for full-time positions found through Proxify. Career-accelerating positions at cutting-edge companies Discover exclusive long-term remote positions at the world's most exciting companies. Hand-picked opportunities, just for you Skip the typical recruitment roadblocks and biases with personally matched positions. One seamless process, multiple opportunities A one-time contracting process for endless opportunities, with no extra assessments. Compensation Enjoy the same pay, every month with positions landed through Proxify.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Pozisyon Özeti Backend ve frontend geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol alacak, ölçeklenebilir sistemler geliştirebilen Full Stack Developer takım arkadaşı arıyoruz. Bu rolde, microservis mimarisi, modern frontend teknolojileri ve Azure bulut altyapısı ile uçtan uca çözümler üretmeniz beklenmektedir. Sorumluluklar C# ve .NET ile microservis tabanlı API’ler geliştirmek Azure üzerinde çalışan uygulamaların geliştirme ve bakımını yapmak React ve Next.js ile modern web arayüzleri geliştirmek SQL Server, MongoDB, Elasticsearch gibi veri teknolojileriyle çalışmak Kod kalitesi ve ekip içi geliştirme süreçlerine katkı sağlamak Nitelikler Minimum 7 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimi C# backend ve microservis mimarisi tecrübesi Azure platformu üzerinde çalışma deneyimi React ve Next.js bilgisi SQL Server, MongoDB, Elasticsearch veya benzeri teknolojilerle deneyim İyi iletişim becerileri ve takım çalışmasına yatkınlık

title: Senior Full Stack Java Developer
description: We are one of the leading Management & Technology Consulting firm in Turkish Financial Services Sector and we would like to strengthen our High Performing Team consisting of a wide range of -Talents- from new graduates to experienced professionals. If you believe that this is the right time to challenge yourself, you are very welcome to our Team! We are currently seeking " Senior Java Developer (Remote / Hybrid) ". QUALIFICATIONS Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Computer Science or related field from a reputable university Proven experience on Java and its ecosystems, Proven experience on popular frameworks or concepts such as Spring Boot, Spring MVC, React, Git, Hibernate, RESTful, SOAP, Knowledge of RDBMS (Oracle, SQL Server), Experience leveraging design patterns and software engineering best practices for a full stack software development life cycle of enterprise applications, Experience with CI/CD tools (Jenkins..), version control tools (BitBucket, Git…), managing and tracking work using management tools like JIRA, Experience in following and promoting Agile practices, TDD, BDD, Understanding of common offerings by cloud providers (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud…), cloud native principles and cloud services to propose scalable solutions, Experience on finance and banking sector is a plus, Good command of spoken and written English. JOB DESCRIPTION Guide developers, create and review technical designs, create and review design patterns, Oversee the design and development of software and infrastructure components, Responsible for the analysis of new and emerging technologies, Lead multiple migrations from applications to microservices cloud-based applications, Create and maintain architecture, provide guidance and technical expertise an develop and maintain the technology roadmap, Lead the development of new concepts to support the business strategy and provide recommendations to leverage technology, Develop, create, and modify software applications or specialized programs in accordance with applicable software development methodology, meeting code quality metrics, Produce specifications and user documentation on software applications being developed.
